title: Fix admin panel access via logo tap and correct Instagram profile link

requirements.text: Make the admin panel accessible by tapping/clicking the site logo in the Navigation and Footer components. When the logo is clicked, trigger the Internet Identity login flow (if not already authenticated) and redirect to the /admin route upon successful authentication. The logo should not visually indicate admin access to regular visitors.

quotes: if I tap on logo I can access admin pannel
Create website without any mistake in admin panel by taping on logo I can edit images or upload images and can edit text

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the logo in the Navigation bar initiates admin login flow
Clicking the logo in the Footer initiates admin login flow
After successful Internet Identity authentication as admin, user is redirected to /admin
Non-admin users clicking the logo are prompted to authenticate but see an access-denied message if not admin
Logo appearance is unchanged for regular visitors — no visible admin hint

requirements.text: Ensure the AdminPanel page (/admin route) provides full editing capabilities: upload/replace the site logo, upload/replace the hero cover image, upload/replace the artist portrait image used in the About section, add/edit/delete artworks in the gallery, and edit key text content (artist name, tagline, bio). All changes must persist to the backend.

quotes: edit all images along with the artist images
I can edit images or upload images and can edit text

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can upload or replace the site logo
Admin can upload or replace the hero cover image
Admin can upload or replace the artist portrait/profile image shown in the About section
Admin can add, edit, and delete artworks in the gallery
Admin can edit the artist name, tagline, and bio text displayed on the site
All edits are saved to the backend and reflected on the public-facing portfolio immediately
Admin panel is only accessible to authenticated admin users

requirements.text: Fix the Instagram link in the ContactSection (and anywhere else it appears on the site) so it opens the specific Instagram profile page: https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar?igsh=bmRsdGx6Z3Nrd2Vy — not the generic Instagram homepage.

quotes: insta page is not opening for only insta opening not that particular page https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar?igsh=bmRsdGx6Z3Nrd2Vy

acceptanceCriteria: The Instagram card/button in ContactSection links to https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar?igsh=bmRsdGx6Z3Nrd2Vy
The link opens in a new tab
No other Instagram links on the site point to the generic Instagram homepage

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Admin access must use Internet Identity authentication — no custom auth system
All backend logic must remain in the single main actor file (backend/main.mo)
nonGoals: Adding any new sections or pages beyond what already exists
Redesigning the visual theme or layout
Integrating any third-party services other than Internet Identity
